episodes.title: Sarah Ferguson's LOVE AFFAIR with Diddy - Andrew Lownie's new BOMBSHELL exposé | Palace Authorised
episodes.description:
In this WORLD EXCLUSIVE, Andrew Lownie sits down for his first TV interview in advance of the publication of the paperback edition of his blockbuster exposé on the House of York, 'Entitled', which looked at the lives of the former Prince Andrew and Sarah Ferguson.

Here, he reveals explosive NEW material (some of it too hot for the hardback), including shocking allegations of Andrew's cruelty to animals, Sarah Ferguson's years long friends-with-benefits affair with rapper Diddy aka P Diddy aka Puff Daddy aka Sean Combs, and the inventive ways the former Duke of York's subordinates took revenge on him for his own bad behaviour be it naval colleagues or his police bodyguard.

READ MORE HERE: Sarah Ferguson's secret 'friends with benefits' relationship with P. Diddy: It lasted for years, now ANDREW LOWNIE reveals illicit trysts with 'bad boy' rapper that'll have world agog
https://www.dailymail.com/news/royals/article-15801997/sarah-ferguson-secret-friends-benefits-p-diddy.html

Andrew Lownie also gives his thoughts on what the Royal Family REALLY knew about Prince Andrew's sordid conduct and looks ahead to the possibility of his being charged - and even going to trial!

Buy the updated paperback of 'Entitled' here: https://amzn.to/4tUJJy9

Sign up for the Palace Confidential Newsletter here: https://bit.ly/PalaceConfidentialNewsletter
